title: poa nemoralis var. carpatica
intro: Poa nemoralis var. carpatica, also known as Carpathian meadow grass or Mountain hair grass, is a subspecies of the Poa nemoralis plant, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This perennial grass is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues due to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. carpatica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in teas, and it is also used as a component in topical creams and ointments for skin issues and injuries.
